title: vepris hiernii
intro: Vepris hiernii, also known as the African yellow myrtle, is a flowering plant species in the Rutaceae family. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vepris hiernii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Vepris hiernii include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
